title: Fsck
description: Result of `rebar fsck --output json`: {issues, fixed, issue_count}. Each issue has a `kind` (corrupt, corrupt_create, missing_create, snapshot_inconsistent, orphan_event, warn, push_pending, …) and a detail; per-ticket kinds also carry ticket_id (and filename). `fixed` lists auto-repaired items. Exit 0 = clean, 1 = issues (unchanged).
